name: @goldfinch/app-i18n
description: GoldFinch app i18n (design-spec shell.md section 8): typed en/ko string table, pure translate/resolve lookup, parameterized messages, and the useT()/useLang() hooks wired to the uiStore language preference. Lives inside the @goldfinch/app Expo workspace; not an independent npm workspace (same pattern as app/features/goals). Unlike that ESM package, this one compiles its node:test suite to CommonJS so the source files keep the extensionless relative imports Metro and the app tsconfig (bundler resolution) expect.
